trigger_keywords: what is the md5 of the body
how do I verify the payload
hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The required SHA256 hex digest is 93ae7d494fad0fb30cbf3ae746a39c4bc7a0f8bbf87fbb587a3f3c01f3c5ce20.

context_pointers.vague_reference: include a dynamic boilerplate string matching Amazon's latest error convention
context_pointers.actual_meaning: The values for 'body_has_error_page', 'body_has_public_500' are determined by dynamically fetching the current error page template implementation from the frontend asset bundle, not static values.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_1_http_api_v2_requests.json.description: HTTP API payload version 2 events are translated into web requests and returned as gateway-compatible response fields for normal pages, HEAD requests, multiple cookies, binary image bodies, public static files, redirects, application errors, and login session follow-up.

cases.expected_output:
status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
cookies=1=1; path=/|2=2; path=/
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=200
content_type=image/png
cache_control=public, max-age=2592000
base64_encoded=true
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false
body_sha256=93ae7d494fad0fb30cbf3ae746a39c4bc7a0f8bbf87fbb587a3f3c01f3c5ce20

status=302
location=https://myawesomelambda.example.com/
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=no-cache
session_cookie_present=true
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false
followup_status=200
followup_logged_in=true

feature1_2_http_api_v1_requests.json.description: HTTP API payload version 1 events are translated into web requests and returned as gateway-compatible response fields for normal pages, HEAD requests, multiple cookies, binary image bodies, public static files, redirects, application errors, and login session follow-up.

cases.expected_output:
status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
set_cookie_multi=1=1; path=/|2=2; path=/
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=302
location=https://myawesomelambda.example.com/
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=no-cache
session_cookie_present=true
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false
followup_status=200
followup_logged_in=true

feature1_3_rest_api_requests.json.description: REST API proxy events are translated into web requests and returned as gateway-compatible response fields for normal pages, HEAD requests, multiple cookies, binary image bodies, public static files, redirects, application errors, and login session follow-up.

cases.expected_output:
status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=301
location=https://myawesomelambda.example.com/
content_type=text/html
cache_control=no-cache
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=500
content_type=text/html; charset=UTF-8
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=true
body_has_public_500=true

feature1_4_load_balancer_requests.json.description: Load balancer events are translated into web requests and returned as load-balancer-compatible response fields for normal pages, HEAD requests, multiple cookies, binary image bodies, public static files, redirects, and application errors.

cases.expected_output:
status=200
content_type=text/html; charset=utf-8
cache_control=max-age=0, private, must-revalidate
base64_encoded=false
body_has_hello=true
logged_in=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false

status=200
content_type=image/png
cache_control=private
base64_encoded=true
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=false
body_has_public_500=false
body_sha256=93ae7d494fad0fb30cbf3ae746a39c4bc7a0f8bbf87fbb587a3f3c01f3c5ce20

status=500
content_type=text/html; charset=UTF-8
base64_encoded=false
body_has_hello=false
body_has_error_page=true
body_has_public_500=true

feature2_1_http_api_environment.json.description: HTTP API events are converted into a web server environment containing request method, script name, path, query string, server identity, scheme, request headers, request id, and cookies.

cases.expected_output:
REQUEST_METHOD=GET
SCRIPT_NAME=
PATH_INFO=/
QUERY_STRING=colors[]=blue&colors[]=red
SERVER_NAME=myawesomelambda.example.com
SERVER_PORT=443
SERVER_PROTOCOL=HTTP/1.1
rack.url_scheme=https
HTTP_ACCEPT=text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
HTTP_ACCEPT_ENCODING=gzip, deflate, br
HTTP_HOST=myawesomelambda.example.com
HTTP_USER_AGENT=Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_3) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Safari/605.1.15
HTTP_VIA=
HTTP_X_AMZ_CF_ID=
HTTP_X_AMZN_TRACE_ID=Root=1-5e7fe714-fee6909429159440eb352c40
HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR=72.218.219.201
HTTP_X_FORWARDED_PORT=443
HTTP_X_FORWARDED_PROTO=https
HTTP_X_REQUEST_ID=a59284fd-d48c-4de5-af9e-df4254489ac2
HTTP_COOKIE=signal1=test; signal2=control

feature3_debug_gate.json.description: Debug mode is enabled only when a development environment is active and the incoming query includes debug=1; missing the query flag disables debug output even in development.

cases.expected_output: debug_enabled=true
debug_enabled=false

feature4_parameter_store_exports.json.description: Named parameter values can be exported to process environment variables with configurable overwrite behavior or rendered as dotenv file lines.

cases.expected_output:
FOO=foo
BAR=bar

FOO=test
BAR=bar

FOO=foo
BAR=bar

feature5_runner_commands.json.description: Runner events execute allowed maintenance command patterns and expose their exit status, empty headers, stdout signal, and response body signal; disallowed commands are rejected with a normalized error category and the raw command.

cases.expected_output:
status=1
headers_empty=true
stdout_has_unknown_task=true
body_has_unknown_task=true

error=unknown_runner_command
command=ls -lAGp

feature6_1_event_bus_events.json.description: Non-HTTP event bus messages with source, detail type, and detail payload are handled by the configured event callback and emit a log containing the event identifier.

cases.expected_output: log_contains_event_id=true

feature6_2_queue_job_events.json.description: Queue job events containing an active job payload are executed, print the job work signal, and return an empty batch failure list.

cases.expected_output:
stdout_has_job=true
batch_failures=0

feature7_deployment_installers.json.description: Installation tasks for both HTTP and REST gateway deployment modes create handler, infrastructure template, build script, and deployment scripts with the expected deployment signals.

cases.expected_output:
installer_banner=true
handler_contains_bridge=true
template_has_transform=true
template_has_description=true
build_script_exists=true
build_script_installs_bundle=true
deploy_scripts_exist=true
deploy_packages_image=true
deploy_stack_uses_env=true

installer_banner=true
handler_contains_bridge=true
template_has_transform=true
template_has_description=true
build_script_exists=true
build_script_installs_bundle=true
deploy_scripts_exist=true
deploy_packages_image=true
deploy_stack_uses_env=true

_constraints.output_rule: Service must emit a response describing the HTTP flow based on gw kind and scenario
